subject: A small pink-skinned figure with a distinctive tall top-knot hairstyle in a purple outfit, wide-eyed expression, energy effects surrounding them

description: A small humanoid figure with pink or lavender skin stands amid swirling pink and purple energy effects. The figure has a distinctive oversized top-knot hairstyle. The composition is a mid-shot with the figure slightly off-center, energy effects filling the surrounding space.
